from __future__ import annotations


class Wallet:
    def __init__(self, balance: int) -> None:
        self.balance = balance

    def debit(self, amount: int) -> None:
        self.balance -= amount

    def credit(self, amount: int) -> None:
        self.balance += amount


def method_mutates_self_and_peer_object_in_same_block_negative() -> int:
    source = Wallet(10)
    target = Wallet(0)
    source.debit(3)
    target.credit(3)
    return target.balance
